mapping.a_element: codimension-one end-of-the-world brane separating two AdS geometries
mapping.b_element: codimension-one phase interface separating two elastic wells (laminate boundary)

mapping.a_element: extremal (minimal-area) surface anchoring the entanglement entropy
mapping.b_element: interfacial energy of the Gamma-limit concentrated on the interface

brief_justification: The overlap is only the keyword 'interface' and the generic fact that both end up assigning energy/entropy to a codimension-one surface; the actual machinery differs entirely. Paper A computes holographic fine-grained entanglement entropy via the defect-extremal-surface/island prescription in an AdS bulk, while Paper B proves Gamma-convergence of a second-order Modica-Mortola singular-perturbation elasticity functional to a local interfacial energy — no holography, entropy, RT/island extremization, or singular-perturbation Gamma-limit maps role-for-role between them.
